name: 24/7 Golf Traverse City
about: 24/7 Golf is a chain of indoor golf and pickleball facilities across Michigan. The venues feature multiple simulator bays equipped with Trackman iO technology, available for hourly rental. The Traverse City location is one of several sites offering a 24/7 access model. Customers can book online and pay by the hour, regardless of group size, and the facilities are described as suitable for individuals, small groups, and large parties, including corporate events. The primary draw is the combination of state-of-the-art simulator technology and flexible booking options.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to golf simulator bays, available any day or time
Utilization of high-end Trackman iO technology for realistic data and simulation
Flexible hourly pricing model for groups of any size

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest Trackman iO technology is used at all locations. Combines radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging to deliver real-time ball and club data.
